response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior developer with strong software craftsmanship, low-latency systems exposure, and community mentoring experience, but they fall well short of the core requirements for this role. The position demands 8 years of C++ programming; the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~7 months) plus a thesis project, with most systems-level work done in DLang. Large-scale infrastructure experience is limited to roughly two years at Sociomantic, and there is no formal technical-leadership role owning platform strategy, priorities, or cross-team alignment at the level this Technical Lead position requires.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency backend experience (microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Broad full-stack and systems versatility with strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Far below the required 8 years of C++ experience; systems work was primarily in DLang
No formal technical-leadership role leading platform strategy or managing cross-team priorities and deadlines
Limited cloud compute platform and large-scale distributed infrastructure depth relative to the 5-year requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal technical leadership experience
